TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Wulai, title = Wulai, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wulai} }

S.FORM: Wulai Wulai a sakuwan ku New Taipei City. kumud nu kalesakan, 333.51 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 299.28 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 19.98 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 5,931 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,793 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 2,793 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 47%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Wulai mala 5 a cuwen atu 4 ku niyazu'. kina 4 a niyazu'sa, Tampya , Ulay , Lahaw , Tranan . Wu-lay a niyadu',u Sin-pey-se' a cacayay nu tukay a nikuwanan, yadah ku buyu' i labu, u satabakiay a hebal, u sasabaay nu macelcelay nu sin-cen-ciw i Sin-pei-se, u sakatimulan nu sin-cen-cu i Sin-pa-se'. unsing u aidangan nu U-lay hananay sa, sakatineng nu tau sa, u nipalumaan nu Sakula a bulu atu ungsing hananay. u kasasingangan nina Wulai hananay sa sipakay i lahaday a unsing kaidaw, namapaadih nu hekalay kinaunsing sa, kalabangbangan nu sakay miidangay kasasilacul, i dadan nu unsing sa madih tu ku liwkangay a nipaayaw tu labang sapaini tu lalilucan a piedap, pasuya pacakayay tu aadupanay a patiyamay milihida tu misiwkay tu lalilucan tu unsing a misiwbay. sakula kataynian nu adingsingan a puu' i Wu-lay sa, kakilukilul satu ku mamabitelak nu sakula a balu nu "Wu-lay picidekan a aidangan". hakay i paymihcaan tusaay a bulad malingatu, masa nu sumanahay atu tamilaway a kasumanah nu balu nu sakula pipaadih tu nu Wu-layay a ungsing sapuu'an a pazizaw, kapulungan tu nu masadumaay a langaw nu sakula, i buyu'buyu'an kahaminan maadih i dihep sikalecad nu ya Ci-ye hananay a sakula, Pa-cung hananay a sakula, U-se hananay a sakula, Hu-se hananay a sakula, kasadit nu Wu-layay a kenis i sadingsingan a nikabangcal, masulul tu sikatukuh ku tusaay atu tuluay a bulad kalabangbangan nu sikaudip. U-lay a cascas u U-lay a cascas, namaka Dipun tu nupisilsilan nu Taywan tu waluay a aaidangan, u namaka amis nu Taywan a sakakapahay, u sakatabakiay nu cacascasan. mikacaw tu sakatayda i U-lay a liwlung, taneng miadih tu U-lay nu cascas a tatapangan nu nemnem, mamin maadih ku wayway nu cascas, bangcal sa adihan. nadikudan nama udad macunus ku nanum nu cascas, kapah satu ku demiad adidi' ku misilsilay nu nanum, nina tusaay a pala caay namin kalecad ku bangcal. . cascas nu U-Lay singanganay, waluay a bataan a depah kya talakaw nya cascas. mahiza u mapuypuyay kya sanglacay a dawa, adihan hatiza sa katatabaki nya suni. u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buyu'buyu'an misuayaw tu cascas, kina kitidaan naw u papadengan tu tuud nu binacadan . u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buyu'buyu'an misiwkay tu lalangawan atu wayway nu Tayyan, paadih tu nu sumamaday a tuud nu Tayyan. idaw ku sakanamuhan amiadih ku palaw atu dadiw nu binacadan. tayni midang i U-Lay mahiza tu itizaay kita i kakalayan . anu maydih midang katayni itini sabancalay a kitidaan. miungbangay a kazizeng ina U-Lay aadihan ku u kakacawan kina silamalay. ina silamalay sa na sapitubin tu kilang, ayda hantu sapitubin tu labang tayza midang. . naayaway a mitengtengaay tu kilang i U-lay, ya U-lay hawsa u pidangan idaw ku cascas u sapalahat nu tayniay a piidang . i 52 a mihca malingatu tu mitupin tu labang. uyni a miungbangay a kazizeng sa, u tedemaw ku micuzuhay tu miidangay tayza i aidangan, nika, katuud katuud ku tayniay midang, kyu i 63 a mihcaan sa malingatu mikikayay tu ku kazizeng, u cay-yu ku sapaculil. kasumamadan a zazan mikawaw tu sapisiwbay a kawaw tu nu U-Lay kasumamadan a zazan a patiyamay, u paya' palecad han ku wayway, kya kina wayway mataneng tu kalecalecad. Wu-lay a Ney-tung u sakapahay a idangan nu kilakilangan tulu a bataan saculil ku piazih tu cascas a diheb, lilis nu sauwac saculil i kilakilangan muculil salihalay sa, Wu-lay sakapahay saculilay a kilakilangan a cascas "Ney-tung kilakilangan a idangan", tayza i kilakilangan a Ney-tung, uyni a zazan pakala tu cacay a tadukian ku pananukas, katukuhan u Ney-tung a cascas, banihiw ku bali, satu u nisakapahan nisazayay kapah tu culilan. yincuming i saamisay a kenis nu siyicuminay a kakuwanan, u Tayal a tademaw ku katuuday i tiza mueneng. "U-lay" sa, u ungsing ku kamu nu Tayal hananay, u akuti'ay a nanum ku imi, a pihaymawi tu "Kiluh-ulay". u "cyu-ce-hwan" ku ngangan nu kaCing-cawan atu kaDipunan. Pinsebukan Ihen ŚŹäŚŅóÁĻľSikkelŚĀöÁü≠śöęÁöĄťßźŤ∂≥. i sumamadan nu tusaay a lasubu a mihcan sa, i daw ku nu Tayalay a tademaw u "Squliq" hananay sa, namaka i lalabu nu Pinsabukan a kilakilangan (u Fa-syang a niyazu', Zen-ay-syang, Fu-sing-cu, Taw-yen-syen ayda) tayda i amis mabulaw, makatukuh tu i Ta-ke-kan-si a sauwac (Ś§ßŚĶôŚīĀśļ™, u Ta-han-si a sauwac ayda), i kawananay a lilis u "Ihen" hananay (u ye-hen a niyazu' nu san-kwang-cun, Fu-sing-cu, Taw-yen-syen ayda ), atu Ze-ci "Sikkel", itda pahanhan. satu zayhan katuud tatu ku tademaw, katuuday a tademaw kilul tu sauwac katukuh i San-siya mananeng. zikuzan satu San-siya izaw ku zuma tademaw kakilul tayza i Wan-hua tayza aca i enel nu Kuan-tu, sazikuzay tayza tu i Tan-suy . tumuk ci Klbuk miduduc tu Sin-tian a sauwac katukuh i Pa-lin pakasakamu hawsa, milakuit tu U-lay, miduduc aca tu makatimulay a sauwac katukuh i Trang (ayzaay nu Bu-san nu U-lay).
S.PHON: wur~…ĺai wur~…ĺai a sakuwan ku n…ôw taip…ôi ¶itj. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(tajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan wur~…ĺai mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina * a nijazu Ē~ °sa, tampja , ur~…ĺaj , r~…ĺańßaw , tranan . wu-r~…ĺaj a nijadu Ē~ °,u sin-p…ô-s…ô Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶ajaj nu tukaj a nikuwanan, jadańß ku buju Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu, u satabakiaj a ńß…ôbar~…ĺ, u sasabaaj nu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj nu sin- ¶…ôn- ¶iw i sin-p…ôi-s…ô, u sakatimur~…ĺan nu sin- ¶…ôn- ¶u i sin-pa-s…ô Ē~ °. unsiŇč u aidaŇčan nu u-r~…ĺaj ńßananaj sa, sakatin…ôŇč nu tau sa, u nipar~…ĺumaan nu sakur~…ĺa a bur~…ĺu atu uŇčsiŇč ńßananaj. u kasasiŇčaŇčan nina wur~…ĺai ńßananaj sa sipakaj i r~…ĺańßadaj a unsiŇč kaidaw, namapaadińß nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj kinaunsiŇč sa, kar~…ĺabaŇčbaŇčan nu sakaj miidaŇčaj kasasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, i dadan nu unsiŇč sa madińß tu ku r~…ĺiwkaŇčaj a nipaajaw tu r~…ĺabaŇč sapaini tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an a pi…ôdap, pasuja pa ¶akajaj tu aadupanaj a patijamaj mir~…ĺińßida tu misiwkaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an tu unsiŇč a misiwbaj. sakur~…ĺa katajnian nu adiŇčsiŇčan a puu Ē~ ° i wu-r~…ĺaj sa, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ku mamabit…ôr~…ĺak nu sakur~…ĺa a bar~…ĺu nu "wu-r~…ĺaj pi ¶id…ôkan a aidaŇčan". ńßakaj i pajmińß ¶aan tusaaj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, masa nu sumanańßaj atu tamir~…ĺawaj a kasumanańß nu bar~…ĺu nu sakur~…ĺa pipaadińß tu nu wu-r~…ĺajaj a uŇčsiŇč sapuu Ē~ °an a pazizaw, kapur~…ĺuŇčan tu nu masadumaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw nu sakur~…ĺa, i buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an kańßaminan maadińß i dińß…ôp sikar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ja ¶i-j…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, pa- ¶uŇč ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, u-s…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, ńßu-s…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, kasadit nu wu-r~…ĺajaj a k…ônis i sadiŇčsiŇčan a nikabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, masur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sikatukuńß ku tusaaj atu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺabaŇčbaŇčan nu sikaudip. u-r~…ĺaj a ¶as ¶as u u-r~…ĺaj a ¶as ¶as, namaka dipun tu nupisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu tajwan tu war~…ĺuaj a aaidaŇčan, u namaka amis nu tajwan a sakakapańßaj, u sakatabakiaj nu ¶a ¶as ¶asan. mika ¶aw tu sakatajda i u-r~…ĺaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺuŇč, tan…ôŇč miadińß tu u-r~…ĺaj nu ¶as ¶as a tatapaŇčan nu n…ômn…ôm, mamin maadińß ku wajwaj nu ¶as ¶as, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa adińßan. nadikudan nama udad ma ¶unus ku nanum nu ¶as ¶as, kapańß satu ku d…ômiad adidi Ē~ ° ku misir~…ĺsir~…ĺaj nu nanum, nina tusaaj a par~…ĺa ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. . ¶as ¶as nu u-r~…ĺaj siŇčaŇčanaj, war~…ĺuaj a bataan a d…ôpańß kja tar~…ĺakaw nja ¶as ¶as. mańßiza u mapujpujaj kja saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a dawa, adińßan ńßatiza sa katatabaki nja suni. u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an misuajaw tu ¶as ¶as, kina kitidaan naw u papad…ôŇčan tu tuud nu bina ¶adan . u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an misiwkaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu wajwaj nu tajjan, paadińß tu nu sumamadaj a tuud nu tajjan. idaw ku sakanamuńßan amiadińß ku par~…ĺaw atu dadiw nu bina ¶adan. tajni midaŇč i u-r~…ĺaj mańßiza tu itizaaj kita i kakar~…ĺajan . anu majdińß midaŇč katajni itini saban ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan. miuŇčbaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč ina u-r~…ĺaj aadińßan ku u kaka ¶awan kina sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. ina sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa na sapitubin tu kir~…ĺaŇč, ajda ńßantu sapitubin tu r~…ĺabaŇč tajza midaŇč. . naajawaj a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaaj tu kir~…ĺaŇč i u-r~…ĺaj, ja u-r~…ĺaj ńßawsa u pidaŇčan idaw ku ¶as ¶as u sapar~…ĺańßat nu tajniaj a piidaŇč . i ** a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč. ujni a miuŇčbaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč sa, u t…ôd…ômaw ku mi ¶uzuńßaj tu miidaŇčaj tajza i aidaŇčan, nika, katuud katuud ku tajniaj midaŇč, kju i ** a mińß ¶aan sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikikajaj tu ku kaziz…ôŇč, u ¶aj-ju ku sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. kasumamadan a zazan mikawaw tu sapisiwbaj a kawaw tu nu u-r~…ĺaj kasumamadan a zazan a patijamaj, u paja Ē~ ° par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan ku wajwaj, kja kina wajwaj matan…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. wu-r~…ĺaj a n…ô-tuŇč u sakapańßaj a idaŇčan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tur~…ĺu a bataan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku piazińß tu ¶as ¶as a dińß…ôb, r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu sauwa ¶ sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sa, wu-r~…ĺaj sakapańßaj sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ¶as ¶as "n…ô-tuŇč kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a idaŇčan", tajza i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a n…ô-tuŇč, ujni a zazan pakar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a tadukian ku pananukas, katukuńßan u n…ô-tuŇč a ¶as ¶as, banińßiw ku bar~…ĺi, satu u nisakapańßan nisazajaj kapańß tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. jin ¶umiŇč i saamisaj a k…ônis nu siji ¶uminaj a kakuwanan, u tajar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj i tiza mu…ôn…ôŇč. "u-r~…ĺaj" sa, u uŇčsiŇč ku kamu nu tajar~…ĺ ńßananaj, u akuti Ē~ °aj a nanum ku imi, a pińßajmawi tu "kir~…ĺuńß-ur~…ĺaj". u " ¶ju- ¶…ô-ńßwan" ku ŇčaŇčan nu ka ¶iŇč- ¶awan atu kadipunan. pins…ôbukan ińß…ôn ***sikk…ôr~…ĺ******. i sumamadan nu tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an sa, i daw ku nu tajar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw u "s*ur~…ĺi*" ńßananaj sa, namaka i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu pinsabukan a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan (u fa-sjaŇč a nijazu Ē~ °, z…ôn-aj-sjaŇč, fu-siŇč- ¶u, taw-j…ôn-sj…ôn ajda) tajda i amis mabur~…ĺaw, makatukuńß tu i ta-k…ô-kan-si a sauwa ¶ (****, u ta-ńßan-si a sauwa ¶ ajda), i kawananaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺis u "ińß…ôn" ńßananaj (u j…ô-ńß…ôn a nijazu Ē~ ° nu san-kwaŇč- ¶un, fu-siŇč- ¶u, taw-j…ôn-sj…ôn ajda ), atu z…ô- ¶i "sikk…ôr~…ĺ", itda pańßanńßan. satu zajńßan katuud tatu ku tad…ômaw, katuudaj a tad…ômaw kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sauwa ¶ katukuńß i san-sija manan…ôŇč. zikuzan satu san-sija izaw ku zuma tad…ômaw kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ tajza i wan-ńßua tajza a ¶a i …ôn…ôr~…ĺ nu kuan-tu, sazikuzaj tajza tu i tan-suj . tumuk ¶i kr~…ĺbuk midudu ¶ tu sin-tian a sauwa ¶ katukuńß i pa-r~…ĺin pakasakamu ńßawsa, mir~…ĺakuit tu u-r~…ĺaj, midudu ¶ a ¶a tu makatimur~…ĺaj a sauwa ¶ katukuńß i traŇč (ajzaaj nu bu-san nu u-r~…ĺaj).
S.FORM: Wulai Wulai a sakuwan ku New Taipei City. kumud nu kalesakan, 333.51 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 299.28 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 19.98 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 5,931 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 1,793 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 2,793 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 47%(Tayal) ku kasabinawlan. u tademaw ilabu nu siyang u paylang ku alumanay. nikasakuwakuwan Wulai mala 5 a cuwen atu 4 ku niyazu'. kina 4 a niyazu'sa, Tampya , Ulay , Lahaw , Tranan . Wu-lay a niyadu',u Sin-pey-se' a cacayay nu tukay a nikuwanan, yadah ku buyu' i labu, u satabakiay a hebal, u sasabaay nu macelcelay nu sin-cen-ciw i Sin-pei-se, u sakatimulan nu sin-cen-cu i Sin-pa-se'. unsing u aidangan nu U-lay hananay sa, sakatineng nu tau sa, u nipalumaan nu Sakula a bulu atu ungsing hananay. u kasasingangan nina Wulai hananay sa sipakay i lahaday a unsing kaidaw, namapaadih nu hekalay kinaunsing sa, kalabangbangan nu sakay miidangay kasasilacul, i dadan nu unsing sa madih tu ku liwkangay a nipaayaw tu labang sapaini tu lalilucan a piedap, pasuya pacakayay tu aadupanay a patiyamay milihida tu misiwkay tu lalilucan tu unsing a misiwbay. sakula kataynian nu adingsingan a puu' i Wu-lay sa, kakilukilul satu ku mamabitelak nu sakula a balu nu "Wu-lay picidekan a aidangan". hakay i paymihcaan tusaay a bulad malingatu, masa nu sumanahay atu tamilaway a kasumanah nu balu nu sakula pipaadih tu nu Wu-layay a ungsing sapuu'an a pazizaw, kapulungan tu nu masadumaay a langaw nu sakula, i buyu'buyu'an kahaminan maadih i dihep sikalecad nu ya Ci-ye hananay a sakula, Pa-cung hananay a sakula, U-se hananay a sakula, Hu-se hananay a sakula, kasadit nu Wu-layay a kenis i sadingsingan a nikabangcal, masulul tu sikatukuh ku tusaay atu tuluay a bulad kalabangbangan nu sikaudip. U-lay a cascas u U-lay a cascas, namaka Dipun tu nupisilsilan nu Taywan tu waluay a aaidangan, u namaka amis nu Taywan a sakakapahay, u sakatabakiay nu cacascasan. mikacaw tu sakatayda i U-lay a liwlung, taneng miadih tu U-lay nu cascas a tatapangan nu nemnem, mamin maadih ku wayway nu cascas, bangcal sa adihan. nadikudan nama udad macunus ku nanum nu cascas, kapah satu ku demiad adidi' ku misilsilay nu nanum, nina tusaay a pala caay namin kalecad ku bangcal. . cascas nu U-Lay singanganay, waluay a bataan a depah kya talakaw nya cascas. mahiza u mapuypuyay kya sanglacay a dawa, adihan hatiza sa katatabaki nya suni. u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buyu'buyu'an misuayaw tu cascas, kina kitidaan naw u papadengan tu tuud nu binacadan . u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buyu'buyu'an misiwkay tu lalangawan atu wayway nu Tayyan, paadih tu nu sumamaday a tuud nu Tayyan. idaw ku sakanamuhan amiadih ku palaw atu dadiw nu binacadan. tayni midang i U-Lay mahiza tu itizaay kita i kakalayan . anu maydih midang katayni itini sabancalay a kitidaan. miungbangay a kazizeng ina U-Lay aadihan ku u kakacawan kina silamalay. ina silamalay sa na sapitubin tu kilang, ayda hantu sapitubin tu labang tayza midang. . naayaway a mitengtengaay tu kilang i U-lay, ya U-lay hawsa u pidangan idaw ku cascas u sapalahat nu tayniay a piidang . i 52 a mihca malingatu tu mitupin tu labang. uyni a miungbangay a kazizeng sa, u tedemaw ku micuzuhay tu miidangay tayza i aidangan, nika, katuud katuud ku tayniay midang, kyu i 63 a mihcaan sa malingatu mikikayay tu ku kazizeng, u cay-yu ku sapaculil. kasumamadan a zazan mikawaw tu sapisiwbay a kawaw tu nu U-Lay kasumamadan a zazan a patiyamay, u paya' palecad han ku wayway, kya kina wayway mataneng tu kalecalecad. Wu-lay a Ney-tung u sakapahay a idangan nu kilakilangan tulu a bataan saculil ku piazih tu cascas a diheb, lilis nu sauwac saculil i kilakilangan muculil salihalay sa, Wu-lay sakapahay saculilay a kilakilangan a cascas "Ney-tung kilakilangan a idangan", tayza i kilakilangan a Ney-tung, uyni a zazan pakala tu cacay a tadukian ku pananukas, katukuhan u Ney-tung a cascas, banihiw ku bali, satu u nisakapahan nisazayay kapah tu culilan. yincuming i saamisay a kenis nu siyicuminay a kakuwanan, u Tayal a tademaw ku katuuday i tiza mueneng. "U-lay" sa, u ungsing ku kamu nu Tayal hananay, u akuti'ay a nanum ku imi, a pihaymawi tu "Kiluh-ulay". u "cyu-ce-hwan" ku ngangan nu kaCing-cawan atu kaDipunan. Pinsebukan Ihen ŚŹäŚŅóÁĻľSikkelŚĀöÁü≠śöęÁöĄťßźŤ∂≥. i sumamadan nu tusaay a lasubu a mihcan sa, i daw ku nu Tayalay a tademaw u "Squliq" hananay sa, namaka i lalabu nu Pinsabukan a kilakilangan (u Fa-syang a niyazu', Zen-ay-syang, Fu-sing-cu, Taw-yen-syen ayda) tayda i amis mabulaw, makatukuh tu i Ta-ke-kan-si a sauwac (Ś§ßŚĶôŚīĀśļ™, u Ta-han-si a sauwac ayda), i kawananay a lilis u "Ihen" hananay (u ye-hen a niyazu' nu san-kwang-cun, Fu-sing-cu, Taw-yen-syen ayda ), atu Ze-ci "Sikkel", itda pahanhan. satu zayhan katuud tatu ku tademaw, katuuday a tademaw kilul tu sauwac katukuh i San-siya mananeng. zikuzan satu San-siya izaw ku zuma tademaw kakilul tayza i Wan-hua tayza aca i enel nu Kuan-tu, sazikuzay tayza tu i Tan-suy . tumuk ci Klbuk miduduc tu Sin-tian a sauwac katukuh i Pa-lin pakasakamu hawsa, milakuit tu U-lay, miduduc aca tu makatimulay a sauwac katukuh i Trang (ayzaay nu Bu-san nu U-lay).
S.PHON: wur~…ĺai wur~…ĺai a sakuwan ku n…ôw taip…ôi ¶itj. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti ***.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(tajar~…ĺ) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u tad…ômaw ir~…ĺabu nu sijaŇč u pajr~…ĺaŇč ku ar~…ĺumanaj. nikasakuwakuwan wur~…ĺai mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu * ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina * a nijazu Ē~ °sa, tampja , ur~…ĺaj , r~…ĺańßaw , tranan . wu-r~…ĺaj a nijadu Ē~ °,u sin-p…ô-s…ô Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶ajaj nu tukaj a nikuwanan, jadańß ku buju Ē~ ° i r~…ĺabu, u satabakiaj a ńß…ôbar~…ĺ, u sasabaaj nu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺaj nu sin- ¶…ôn- ¶iw i sin-p…ôi-s…ô, u sakatimur~…ĺan nu sin- ¶…ôn- ¶u i sin-pa-s…ô Ē~ °. unsiŇč u aidaŇčan nu u-r~…ĺaj ńßananaj sa, sakatin…ôŇč nu tau sa, u nipar~…ĺumaan nu sakur~…ĺa a bur~…ĺu atu uŇčsiŇč ńßananaj. u kasasiŇčaŇčan nina wur~…ĺai ńßananaj sa sipakaj i r~…ĺańßadaj a unsiŇč kaidaw, namapaadińß nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj kinaunsiŇč sa, kar~…ĺabaŇčbaŇčan nu sakaj miidaŇčaj kasasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, i dadan nu unsiŇč sa madińß tu ku r~…ĺiwkaŇčaj a nipaajaw tu r~…ĺabaŇč sapaini tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an a pi…ôdap, pasuja pa ¶akajaj tu aadupanaj a patijamaj mir~…ĺińßida tu misiwkaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶an tu unsiŇč a misiwbaj. sakur~…ĺa katajnian nu adiŇčsiŇčan a puu Ē~ ° i wu-r~…ĺaj sa, kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu ku mamabit…ôr~…ĺak nu sakur~…ĺa a bar~…ĺu nu "wu-r~…ĺaj pi ¶id…ôkan a aidaŇčan". ńßakaj i pajmińß ¶aan tusaaj a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, masa nu sumanańßaj atu tamir~…ĺawaj a kasumanańß nu bar~…ĺu nu sakur~…ĺa pipaadińß tu nu wu-r~…ĺajaj a uŇčsiŇč sapuu Ē~ °an a pazizaw, kapur~…ĺuŇčan tu nu masadumaaj a r~…ĺaŇčaw nu sakur~…ĺa, i buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an kańßaminan maadińß i dińß…ôp sikar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ja ¶i-j…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, pa- ¶uŇč ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, u-s…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, ńßu-s…ô ńßananaj a sakur~…ĺa, kasadit nu wu-r~…ĺajaj a k…ônis i sadiŇčsiŇčan a nikabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, masur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sikatukuńß ku tusaaj atu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad kar~…ĺabaŇčbaŇčan nu sikaudip. u-r~…ĺaj a ¶as ¶as u u-r~…ĺaj a ¶as ¶as, namaka dipun tu nupisir~…ĺsir~…ĺan nu tajwan tu war~…ĺuaj a aaidaŇčan, u namaka amis nu tajwan a sakakapańßaj, u sakatabakiaj nu ¶a ¶as ¶asan. mika ¶aw tu sakatajda i u-r~…ĺaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺuŇč, tan…ôŇč miadińß tu u-r~…ĺaj nu ¶as ¶as a tatapaŇčan nu n…ômn…ôm, mamin maadińß ku wajwaj nu ¶as ¶as, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sa adińßan. nadikudan nama udad ma ¶unus ku nanum nu ¶as ¶as, kapańß satu ku d…ômiad adidi Ē~ ° ku misir~…ĺsir~…ĺaj nu nanum, nina tusaaj a par~…ĺa ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. . ¶as ¶as nu u-r~…ĺaj siŇčaŇčanaj, war~…ĺuaj a bataan a d…ôpańß kja tar~…ĺakaw nja ¶as ¶as. mańßiza u mapujpujaj kja saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a dawa, adińßan ńßatiza sa katatabaki nja suni. u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an misuajaw tu ¶as ¶as, kina kitidaan naw u papad…ôŇčan tu tuud nu bina ¶adan . u kitidaan a sakaudip nu buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ °an misiwkaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu wajwaj nu tajjan, paadińß tu nu sumamadaj a tuud nu tajjan. idaw ku sakanamuńßan amiadińß ku par~…ĺaw atu dadiw nu bina ¶adan. tajni midaŇč i u-r~…ĺaj mańßiza tu itizaaj kita i kakar~…ĺajan . anu majdińß midaŇč katajni itini saban ¶ar~…ĺaj a kitidaan. miuŇčbaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč ina u-r~…ĺaj aadińßan ku u kaka ¶awan kina sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj. ina sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa na sapitubin tu kir~…ĺaŇč, ajda ńßantu sapitubin tu r~…ĺabaŇč tajza midaŇč. . naajawaj a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaaj tu kir~…ĺaŇč i u-r~…ĺaj, ja u-r~…ĺaj ńßawsa u pidaŇčan idaw ku ¶as ¶as u sapar~…ĺańßat nu tajniaj a piidaŇč . i ** a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mitupin tu r~…ĺabaŇč. ujni a miuŇčbaŇčaj a kaziz…ôŇč sa, u t…ôd…ômaw ku mi ¶uzuńßaj tu miidaŇčaj tajza i aidaŇčan, nika, katuud katuud ku tajniaj midaŇč, kju i ** a mińß ¶aan sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikikajaj tu ku kaziz…ôŇč, u ¶aj-ju ku sapa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ. kasumamadan a zazan mikawaw tu sapisiwbaj a kawaw tu nu u-r~…ĺaj kasumamadan a zazan a patijamaj, u paja Ē~ ° par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan ku wajwaj, kja kina wajwaj matan…ôŇč tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. wu-r~…ĺaj a n…ô-tuŇč u sakapańßaj a idaŇčan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tur~…ĺu a bataan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ku piazińß tu ¶as ¶as a dińß…ôb, r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu sauwa ¶ sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sa, wu-r~…ĺaj sakapańßaj sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a ¶as ¶as "n…ô-tuŇč kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a idaŇčan", tajza i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a n…ô-tuŇč, ujni a zazan pakar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a tadukian ku pananukas, katukuńßan u n…ô-tuŇč a ¶as ¶as, banińßiw ku bar~…ĺi, satu u nisakapańßan nisazajaj kapańß tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. jin ¶umiŇč i saamisaj a k…ônis nu siji ¶uminaj a kakuwanan, u tajar~…ĺ a tad…ômaw ku katuudaj i tiza mu…ôn…ôŇč. "u-r~…ĺaj" sa, u uŇčsiŇč ku kamu nu tajar~…ĺ ńßananaj, u akuti Ē~ °aj a nanum ku imi, a pińßajmawi tu "kir~…ĺuńß-ur~…ĺaj". u " ¶ju- ¶…ô-ńßwan" ku ŇčaŇčan nu ka ¶iŇč- ¶awan atu kadipunan. pins…ôbukan ińß…ôn ***sikk…ôr~…ĺ******. i sumamadan nu tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶an sa, i daw ku nu tajar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw u "s*ur~…ĺi*" ńßananaj sa, namaka i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu pinsabukan a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan (u fa-sjaŇč a nijazu Ē~ °, z…ôn-aj-sjaŇč, fu-siŇč- ¶u, taw-j…ôn-sj…ôn ajda) tajda i amis mabur~…ĺaw, makatukuńß tu i ta-k…ô-kan-si a sauwa ¶ (****, u ta-ńßan-si a sauwa ¶ ajda), i kawananaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺis u "ińß…ôn" ńßananaj (u j…ô-ńß…ôn a nijazu Ē~ ° nu san-kwaŇč- ¶un, fu-siŇč- ¶u, taw-j…ôn-sj…ôn ajda ), atu z…ô- ¶i "sikk…ôr~…ĺ", itda pańßanńßan. satu zajńßan katuud tatu ku tad…ômaw, katuudaj a tad…ômaw kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu sauwa ¶ katukuńß i san-sija manan…ôŇč. zikuzan satu san-sija izaw ku zuma tad…ômaw kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ tajza i wan-ńßua tajza a ¶a i …ôn…ôr~…ĺ nu kuan-tu, sazikuzaj tajza tu i tan-suj . tumuk ¶i kr~…ĺbuk midudu ¶ tu sin-tian a sauwa ¶ katukuńß i pa-r~…ĺin pakasakamu ńßawsa, mir~…ĺakuit tu u-r~…ĺaj, midudu ¶ a ¶a tu makatimur~…ĺaj a sauwa ¶ katukuńß i traŇč (ajzaaj nu bu-san nu u-r~…ĺaj).
